name: Rindergulasch (Beef Goulash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan or Dutch oven.
2. Add meat cubes and brown well, approximately 10 minutes.
3. Stir in onions and cook until soft.
4. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, garlic salt, paprika, and sugar. Blend thoroughly.
5. Pour in hot water; cover and simmer gently about 1 1/2 hours.
6. In a small jar or container, mix flour with cold water. Ensure all lumps are broken up.
7. Add the mixture to meat about 7 minutes before the end of cooking time.
8. Stir constantly until sauce is thickened and bubbling.
9. Remove from heat; stir in cream. Serve with noodles, accompanied by a tomato salad if desired.
